column3: (Content Security Policy Header Not Set) — JSON API; enforce CSP at edge / UI.
(Server Leaks Version Information via HTTP Headers) — baseline noise for containerized ASP.NET.
(Server Leaks Information via "X-Powered-By" HTTP Response Header Field(s))
(X-Frame-Options Header Not Set) — API not framed; UI sets framing policy.
(Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set) — TLS termination often at Front Door / ingress.
